seasonName: Thursday of week 5 in Ordinary Time

readings.label: First Reading
readings.summary: For the sake of my servant David, I will leave you one tribe.
readings.spokenReference: A reading from the First Book of Kings, chapter eleven, verses four through thirteen.

translations.it: Per amore del mio servo Davide, ti lascero una tribu.
translations.vi: Vi toi trung thanh David, Ta se de lai cho nguoi mot chi toc.

readings.label: Responsorial Psalm
readings.summary: Lord, remember us, for the love you bear your people.
readings.spokenReference: A reading from the Book of Psalms, verses three through four, thirty-five through thirty-seven, forty.

translations.it: Signore, ricordati di noi, per l'amore che porti al tuo popolo.
translations.vi: Lay Chua, xin nho den chung con vi tinh thuong danh cho dan Nguoi.

readings.label: Gospel
readings.summary: The astuteness of the Syro-Phoenician woman.
readings.spokenReference: A reading from the Holy Gospel according to Saint Mark, chapter seven, verses twenty-four through thirty.

translations.vi: Su nhay ben cua nguoi phu nu Syro-Phoenicia.

upcomingFeasts: Wednesday of week 5 in Ordinary Time or Our Lady of Lourdes
Tuesday of week 6 in Ordinary Time or The Seven Holy Founders of the Servite Order

christianArt.title: Mark 7: 24-30 (2026)
christianArt.context: Daily Gospel art and reflection from Christian Art for Mark 7: 24-30 (2026). Open to read the full meditation.
christianArt.author: Patrick van der Vorst
